name: Low-Fat Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Fat-free or low-fat cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles; drain and set aside.
2. In a skillet or frying pan, cook the meat; drain fat and place in a colander.
3. Rinse the cooked meat with hot water.
4. Add mushrooms and chopped onion to the cooked meat.
5. In a 9x13x2-inch baking dish, layer one-third of the cooked lasagna noodles with half the meat mixture, half cottage cheese, half carrots, half Mozzarella, and one-third sauce.
6. Repeat layers.
7. Top with remaining noodles and sauce.
8. Cook uncovered for 35 minutes at 350 degrees.
9. Remove from oven; cover with foil.
10. Let stand 20 minutes before serving.
